description.short: A cross-platform offline-first application utilizing a custom synchronization queue for network resilience, featuring real-time shared counters and native deep linking integration.
long: Architected an offline-first architecture with optimistic UI, durable command queue, background sync, and server-side idempotency to safely replay mutations after network failures/app restarts.

Designed access/refresh token auth with rotation and dual delivery (HTTP-only cookies for web, Bearer tokens for native) including automatic refresh/retry and concurrent refresh de-duplication in the API client.

Engineered a real-time collaboration layer for shared counters with server-authoritative participant resolution and client-side state reconciliation to keep multiple devices consistent during concurrent updates.

description.short: A reaction-time training app with timed drills, animated feedback, user accounts, and performance history, backed by a secure Express/PostgreSQL API.
long: Built a Vue 3/Pinia reaction-time game UI with configurable target size/speed, recent scores, profile history, and GSAP-driven transitions across game/profile states.
Structured the Express/PostgreSQL API around Sequelize models and repository modules for users, games, stats, and settings.
Implemented cookie-based JWT login with HTTP-only cookies, rate limiting, and saved per-game settings snapshots for filtered performance history.

description.short: A real-time tic-tac-toe lobby with JWT-authenticated Socket.IO sessions, server-side move validation, rematches, forfeits, and disconnect recovery.
long: Built server-authoritative Node.js/Socket.IO game handlers for tic-tac-toe move validation, turn enforcement, win/draw resolution, forfeits, and rematches.
Implemented JWT-authenticated Socket.IO connections with user-to-socket session tracking for multi-tab support and reconnect/soft-disconnect handling.
Persisted user and game records with Prisma/PostgreSQL and added Socket.IO integration tests for auth, lobby lifecycle, win/draw outcomes, rematches, and disconnect behavior.

description.short: An algorithm visualization prototype featuring an insertion-sort visualizer using Pinia and GSAP for playback, scrubbing, animation settings, and synchronized explanatory text.
long: Built a Nuxt 3/Vue 3 visualization shell with category navigation, searchable module lists, and dynamic component loading around an implemented insertion-sort visualizer.
Created GSAP timeline controls for play/pause, step navigation, restart, speed changes, and TextPlugin-powered explanations synchronized with visual algorithm steps.
Optimized animation state by using Pinia and Vue's markRaw to keep heavy GSAP timeline objects out of reactivity.

description.short: A TypeScript CLI for packaging, installing, and running LangGraph workflow templates with manifest-based distribution and bundled OpenCode execution assets.
long: Built @mawm/cli, a TypeScript ESM CLI with typed command definitions, workflow metadata validation, manifest management, and install/update/remove/list flows.
Designed a workflow template distribution model with global installs, project-local planning assets, and scaffolded LangGraph workflow packages.
Bundled OpenCode execution assets that start local LangGraph workflow servers, manage run state, support thread resume, and summarize workflow results.
